attacking_style: Opportunistic attacker who exploits technical features (roundabouts, corners) in final kilometers rather than sustained power efforts. Prefers tactical positioning gambits over pure acceleration.
team_tactics: Primary role as elite leadout specialist, delivering sprinters through technical final kilometers. Secondary role includes early domestique work for GC riders before major climbs (20km+ out).
terrain_preference: Technical sprint finishes with critical positioning points (corners, roundabouts). Excels on downhill-to-headwind transitions requiring advanced bike handling. Struggles on pure power climbs.
vulnerability: Lacks sustained power for breakaways beyond initial tactical surge. Early deployment on mountain stages suggests limited climbing durability at Grand Tour intensity.
key_patterns: Controls critical final corners within 1km for sprinter delivery with elite precision (2 instances)
Launches tactical attacks at technical features gambling on hesitation rather than raw power (2 observations)
Deploys early for team duties on mountain stages well before decisive moments (2 instances)
Positioning expertise converts technical terrain advantages into leadout dominance
form_trajectory: neutral: 2022 shows consistent tactical intelligence but mixed execution—excellent leadout work countered by failed breakaway attempts lacking sustained power
built_from: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 19
